name: menu
title: Menu
description: Positioned dropdown menu with sections, item selection styles, toggle items, and destructive hold-to-confirm items.

consumption.typeImport: import type { MenuProps, MenuSection, MenuItemData, MenuSide, MenuAlign, MenuItemProps, MenuItemSelectionStyle, DestructiveMenuItemProps } from '@compomo/ui';

internalDependencies.note: Used internally by Menu. No action needed — it's bundled in @compomo/ui.
